ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team participating in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team participating in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match is scheduled */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match is held */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home venue of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the league belongs to */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., international, national, local) */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "sport_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the sport's logo */,
  "sport_description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmakers" (
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmaker */,
  "bookmaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the bookmaker is based */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the bookmaker's website */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the bookmaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odd */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the odd belongs to */,
  "bookmaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmaker providing the odd */,
  "team1_odds" REAL /* Odds for the first team */,
  "team2_odds" REAL /* Odds for the second team */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds for a draw (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the odds were updated */,
  "bet_limit" REAL /* Maximum bet amount allowed for this odd */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_bookmaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmaker_id") REFERENCES bookmakers ("bookmaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws for the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the team */,
  "recent_form" TEXT /* Recent form of the team (e.g., WLDW) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current account balance of the user */,
  "preferred_sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred sport */,
  "preferred_league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred league */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the bet */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the bet belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is betting on */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount the user is betting */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., win, draw, over/under) */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., pending, won, lost) */,
  "payout" REAL /* Payout amount if the bet wins */,
  "placed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bet was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bets_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_bets_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "rec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation belongs to */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the recommendation belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is recommended to bet on */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
